improvement: Wire the fail-closed exact-commit dispatch decision builder into the Cloudflare environment preflight workflow and retain its output in the uploaded evidence artifact.
behavior_added: The preflight path filter now includes the dispatch builder and its tests.
The workflow test gate now executes the dispatch-decision test suite.
The independently verified preflight verdict is converted into a dispatch decision bound to the exact repository and 40-character commit SHA.
The workflow fails unless classification is dispatch_ready and the target workflow/ref remain exact and immutable.
The dispatch decision is hashed and retained in the exact-commit preflight artifact.

verification.strongest_completed_route: Fetched the workflow by exact commit after mutation and confirmed the committed blob contains the new trigger paths, test invocation, fail-closed builder invocation, exact binding assertions, digest entry, and artifact retention.
verification.combined_status_observation: Only unrelated Vercel build-rate-limit statuses were returned for the commit; no Cloudflare Actions conclusion was available at evidence-record time.

privacy_boundary: No credential values, account identifiers, private chat, health material, diagnosis, treatment recommendation, or payment logic are included.
claim_boundary: This proves committed source wiring only. It does not prove GitHub Actions execution, credential installation, Cloudflare authorization, deployment, hostname resolution, served identity, or scientific truth.
falsification_route: A workflow run does not execute the dispatch-decision tests.
The generated decision is absent from the uploaded artifact.
A repository or commit mismatch does not fail the workflow.
The decision permits a mutable ref instead of the exact commit.
The artifact digest file omits the dispatch decision.
